name: Hilton Honors American Express Card

verdict.text: Free Hilton points earner with no downside

earn_note: Unusually strong base rate for a no-fee card: 3× on everything else is higher than most paid cards' catch-all rate. The 5× dining/grocery/gas categories have no stated annual cap.

points.note: Same Hilton Honors currency as the Surpass and Aspire tiers; this card just earns it for free, without any of the paid tiers' credits or elite-status boost.

transfer_partners.highlight: 26 airline transfer partners, almost all at a poor 10:1 ratio. Hilton points are built to be spent on hotel stays, not transferred out.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No confirmed recent changes to the airline transfer chart.

insurance.detail: +1 year on warranties of 5 years or less (US purchases)

protection_note: No travel insurance of any kind: no trip delay, trip cancellation, baggage, or rental car coverage. This is a free card built purely for earning Hilton points, not for protecting trips.
rental_note: No rental car coverage at all; use a different card for rentals.

status_perks.name: Hilton Honors Silver Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card: 20% bonus points on stays and a free 5th night on award bookings of 4+ nights. The lightest Hilton status tier.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns Hilton Honors points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Silver status independently

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free: an easy way to pool household spend toward the 7× hotel rate.
